tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within normal limits except for a minimally elevated chloride, which is likely not clinically significant in isolation. Renal function, glucose metabolism, and lipid profile are normal. No evidence of microalbuminuria. Overall, laboratory findings are unremarkable and do not indicate acute or chronic pathology at this time.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
